GpuProjectExec
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [ext_price@2 DESC, i_brand_id@3 ASC NULLS LAST]
    GpuSortExec
      GpuProjectExec
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_brand, i_brand_id], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]

            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_brand@0, i_brand_id@1], 8), input_partitions=8

--- memory ---
